page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.small is an entry-level virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.s2 server family. Built on the KVM hypervisor and utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture, this instance features 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores, with 1 thread per core. It is configured with 2.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 1.0 GB per core.

The hardware profile does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Additionally, the CPU flags indicate a lack of advanced vector extensions (AVX, AVX-512), matrix extensions (AMX), cryptographic acceleration (AES, SHA_NI), and hyper-threading. This streamlined instruction set and resource footprint position the instance as a highly cost-efficient option for basic workloads that do not require specialized hardware acceleration or dense memory configurations.

Given the resource constraints of 2 vCPUs and 2.0 GB of RAM, this server is designed for lightweight administrative tasks, simple web serving, microservices, or development and testing environments. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities for these entry-level workloads without the performance variability often associated with shared-core environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.small is an entry-level virtual machine from the ecs.s2 family, running on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 CPU architecture. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores with 1 thread per core, paired with 2.0 GB of system memory. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, and lacks advanced CPU instruction sets such as AVX, AMX, or cryptographic acceleration. This resource profile offers a highly cost-efficient, basic compute option for workloads with low memory and processing demands. It is suitable for lightweight applications, development environments, and simple web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.small is an entry-level KVM-based virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 2.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for budget-conscious, lightweight workloads.

tagline: A budget-friendly virtual machine featuring dedicated dual-core processing and a compact memory footprint for lightweight workloads.

2.0 GB of system memory with a 1.0 GB per core ratio
